images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunning Japanese gravure idol in her walk-in closet, the scene defined by an elegant, sophisticated underexposed low-key atmosphere despite the harsh direct sunlight piercing through the blinds. She wears a fitted, ribbed white crop top that exposes her toned midriff and navel, paired perfectly with textured denim shorts. Captured via a complex mirror reflection composition, she stands holding a ceramic coffee cup near her lips, gazing into the mirror with a gentle, soft smile that exudes pure charm. The high-quality image highlights her flawless skin texture, faint vellus hair, and large expressive eyes, while the luxury background of blurred clothes and bokeh lighting adds depth. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, ray tracing, global illumination, sharp focus on her reflection.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
